scope_summary: General subsidiary legislation under the Planning and Development Act 2005, applying across Western Australia. Covers procedures for subdivision and related approvals (applications under Act ss. 135, 136, 139, 145), road access conditions on subdivision, easements, integration of subdivision and development (Div 3A), compensation and acquisition procedures, enforcement and infringement notices, applications for review by the Minister, maximum local government fees for planning services (Schedule 2, including development application and scheme amendment fees), and regulation of activities on certain State land. Official consolidated version as at 19 February 2026, incorporating amendments up to the Planning and Development Amendment (State Development) Regulations 2026 (SL 2026/10, commenced 19 Feb 2026).

cross_references.cited: Planning and Development (Development Assessment Panels) Regulations 2011
